prompt:
Embark on a detailed analysis and visualization of the "Palmer Archipelago (Antarctica) penguin data" dataset from Kaggle, aiming to uncover insights about penguin populations.

1. Data Cleaning: Load the dataset, handle missing values, encode categoricals. Input: penguins.csv -> Output: cleaned_penguins.csv
2. Data Exploration: Calculate summary statistics for numerical features (bill length, bill depth, flipper length, body mass) grouped by species. Output: summary_statistics.csv
3. Visualization: Create scatter plots of bill length vs bill depth colored by species, histograms of body mass by species, pair plot of all numerical features. Output: penguin_visualizations.pdf
4. Correlation Analysis: Compute and visualize correlation matrix. Output: correlation_analysis.csv, correlation_heatmap.png
expected: 1. Data cleaning: Data Quality Score — cleaned_penguins.csv with no missing values, categoricals encoded. 2. Data exploration: Summary Statistics Accuracy — summary_statistics.csv grouped by species. 3. Visualization: Visualization Completeness — penguin_visualizations.pdf + correlation_heatmap.png. 4. Visualization: Correlation Coefficient — correlation_analysis.csv.
